title: Onboarding -  Permission for location tracking accepted [Android]
scenario: Location permission granted during onboarding does not persist when accessing FindMyDevice menu on Poly Lens app
steps: Launch the Poly Studio Mobile app for the first time.
Accept the License Agreement and Privacy Policy.
In the system pop-up, tap 'Allow' to grant location tracking permission.
expected: Location tracking is allowed for the Poly Lens app and the user proceeds to further onboarding steps. When the user later accesses the FindMyDevice menu, the app should not ask for permissions again.
